Figure 1: Four-layer architecture of ElephantBroker. Thin TypeScript adapters in Layer A forward requests via HTTP to the Python runtime in Layer B, which delegates storage and search to the Cognee knowledge plane in Layer C, backed by the infrastructure services in Layer D.
